page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance belonging to the ecs.gn6e family. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, built on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 368.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.67 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, it bundles four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 128 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage and relies on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance, measured via stress-ng, is positioned in the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression falls into the bottom 10%. However, the 48 dedicated physical cores elevate multi-core performance to average levels, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression benchmarks. Memory bandwidth is stable, with read-only small block cached operations reaching 1975.99 GB/sec and large block uncached writes at 47.39 GB/sec. Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput both perform within average mid-range tiers.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge represents a high-density resource profile suited for workloads that can leverage parallel GPU processing to offset the lower single-core CPU performance. The lack of local storage requires external storage configurations, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This server is best suited for GPU-accelerated workloads such as deep learning training, parallel scientific computing, high-throughput database operations, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz and 368.0 GB of RAM. Designed for parallel computing, it bundles four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with a total of 128 GB of VRAM, though it lacks local storage and relies on a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While single-core benchmarks for this x86_64 system fall in the lower percentiles, its multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth perform at average levels. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for parallelized workloads, including deep learning, multi-threaded data processing, and GPU-accelerated database operations, where the massive VRAM and dedicated core count can be fully utilized.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 368 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing 128 GB VRAM for parallel computing workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge features 48 Intel vCPUs, 368 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA V100 GPUs with 128 GB VRAM for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated server featuring four NVIDIA V100 GPUs and 48 dedicated cores for parallelized, memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Four bundled NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 128 GB total VRAM
48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs and 368 GB of system memory
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor virtualization
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth performance in benchmarks
Suited for deep learning, parallel computing, and multi-threaded workloads
